frontend.title_info_6: Weekly / Monthly Red Envelope & Rescue Bonus Policy
frontend.info_1: Enjoy VIP privileges immediately upon logging in again after 00:00 the next day.
frontend.info_2: Rebate Time: The system automatically distributes the previous day’s valid betting rebate between 12:00 and 18:00 daily. Rebate funds can be withdrawn with just 1x turnover. The daily rebate cap is NT$600,000.
frontend.info_4: When cumulative valid bets reach the threshold, your VIP level will automatically increase the next day (no skipping levels).
frontend.info_5: Upon promotion/demotion, the system will recalculate valid bet amounts.
frontend.info_6: VIP status must be maintained by meeting the required valid bet amount within 90 days, or the level will be downgraded.
frontend.info_7: Level-Up Bonus: A one-time bonus will be automatically issued on the day you level up, once all conditions are met.
frontend.info_8: Rebate Rate Eligibility: If you reach a new VIP level and had at least NT$5 million in valid bets the day before, you’ll receive the rebate the next day based on your new level’s rate.
frontend.info_9: Upon reaching a new VIP level, members will receive a one-time Level-Up Bonus, automatically issued between 12:00 and 18:00 on the same day.
frontend.info_10: Each VIP level bonus can only be claimed once and cannot be repeated.
frontend.info_11: The bonus amount is based on the new VIP level achieved — higher tiers receive greater rewards.
frontend.info_12: No application is required; the system will automatically distribute the bonus once conditions are met.
frontend.info_13: The platform reserves the right to interpret, modify, suspend, or terminate this promotion at any time.
frontend.info_14: All valid members are eligible to receive a birthday bonus during their birthday month.

frontend.info_17: The birthday bonus must be used within 7 days of receipt; expired bonuses will not be reissued.
frontend.info_18: The platform reserves the right to interpret, modify, pause, or terminate this promotion at any time.
frontend.info_19: Members can receive a sign-in bonus by logging in and checking in daily.
frontend.info_20: Bonus amounts increase with consecutive sign-in days, and special rewards are granted for streaks.
frontend.info_21: If a day is missed, the sign-in streak will reset to day one.
frontend.info_22: No application is required — the bonus will be automatically credited to the member's account.

With The Platform Affiliate Program our partners have a unique possibility to earn 48% commission per period.
frontend.info_33: Your commission percentage rate is determined by both the monthly net loss of the total players recommended by you to The Platform and the number of active members within the qualifying month.
frontend.info_34: With a 48% commission rate, 48% of members’ net losses is your commission.
frontend.info_35: With at least 5 active members (If Active Members less than 5, commission won’t be calculated) will entitle you to start earning commission. Increase in members’ net losses and active members will enable you to earn more.
frontend.info_36: If there are negative for a particular month, that negative balance will be carried over to the succeeding months until new activity results in positive net winnings.
frontend.info_37: All affiliates are subjected to administrative and marketing costs incurred directly for the acquisition of members, paid out to customers as a result of fraud, charge-backs, taxes, banking fees, platform fees, bonuses and other incentives offered to the customer.
frontend.info_38: The commission for poker will be 40% flat based on rake amount.
frontend.info_39: With our Revenue Share Commission Plan, what you earn is directly proportional to the amount of revenue your members generate in total per period. This Plan starts at 28% and rises to 48% depending on how much revenue is generated by the members you send us.
frontend.info_40: Your commission percentage rate is determined by both the monthly net loss of the total members recommended by you to FB88.Com and the number of active members within the qualifying period.
frontend.info_41: There is a minimum amount of PHP100 (or equivalent currency) for pay-out to take effect. Any amount below this threshold will be carried forward to the next month.
frontend.info_42: All Referral Commission Payments will be due and paid in the currency which was selected when your Affiliate Account was first set up.
frontend.info_43: Commission will be transferred to your bank account automatically, with your stated personal information and your bank account. While we offer free pay-out transactions we will not be held responsible if the receiving financial institute impose a fee of any kind at their end.
frontend.info_44: We pay out all affiliate commission within next 9 working days after the last day of month.
frontend.info_45: The Platform reserves the right to change the commission rate, method of calculation of referral commission as we deemed fit.
frontend.info_46: The Platform reserves the right to alter or amend or add any of the terms mentioned above as we deemed fit.
frontend.info_47: The Platform reserves the right to cancel the affiliate account at any point of time without prior notice in the event the affiliate’s performance does not meet our expected quotas at a given period of time.
frontend.info_49: 1. What is the The Platform Affiliate Program?
frontend.info_50: The Platform Affiliate Program is a partnership program where you will earn commissions based on the net loss of wagering activity of members that you refer to The Platform from your Website(s) via online or offline via referrals.
frontend.info_51: The Platform offers attractive affiliate payouts and our program entails absolutely no costs and no risk to you.
